steps.title: Identify the contrast revealing what restaurants aren't doing
steps.content:
The passage contrasts normal business behavior with an exception: “Businesses typically try to promote themselves, but some do not ______ their marketing.” The key detail follows: 33 percent of restaurants never listed on a free review site despite a documented 5 percent revenue increase.

These restaurants are not taking advantage of an available opportunity, revealing what they're failing to do with their marketing.

steps.title: Apply the signal to find the right word
steps.content:
Optimize means to make something as effective or productive as possible.

Restaurants that skip a free tool proven to increase revenue are clearly not optimizing their marketing—they're not maximizing its potential impact.

The other three either don't relate to marketing effectiveness, don't work grammatically with the sentence structure, or contradict the passage's logic.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
